hook: My wife was living a double life
context: I thought I knew everything about Sarah.
We'd been married for three years.
She traveled for work every other weekend.

escalation.text: But six months ago, things got weird.
Photos hit my phone three hours later.
I sat in my car for an hour.
When she got home, I confronted her.

twist: She said: 'They're mine and David's.' David is her husband. Her OTHER husband. She's been married to him for eight years.
cliffhanger: I've been the affair partner this whole time. I was the other man. Should I tell David?
